checks.name: view_safety_ceiling
checks.description: View is only permitted when projectStatus is Active, principal is ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator with their respective constraints, department matches or principal is GlobalAuditor, and embargo is not active or principal is PI

checks.name: edit_safety_ceiling
checks.description: Edit is only permitted when projectStatus is Active, principal is ClinicalResearcher or PrincipalInvestigator with their respective constraints, department matches or principal is GlobalAuditor, and embargo is not active or principal is PI

checks.name: active_project_gate_view
checks.description: View is denied when projectStatus is not Active — no permit should fire for non-active projects

checks.name: active_project_gate_edit
checks.description: Edit is denied when projectStatus is not Active — no permit should fire for non-active projects

checks.name: cross_dept_block_view
checks.description: View is forbidden when department != projectManagingDepartment unless principal is GlobalAuditor

checks.name: cross_dept_block_edit
checks.description: Edit is forbidden when department != projectManagingDepartment unless principal is GlobalAuditor

checks.name: embargo_block_view
checks.description: View is forbidden when requestTime < embargoUntil unless principal is PrincipalInvestigator

checks.name: embargo_block_edit
checks.description: Edit is forbidden when requestTime < embargoUntil unless principal is PrincipalInvestigator

checks.name: floor_clinical_researcher_view
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel > 3, matching department, on an Active non-HighlyRestricted non-embargoed document MUST be able to View

checks.name: floor_clinical_researcher_edit
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel > 3, matching department, on an Active non-HighlyRestricted non-embargoed document MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: floor_pi_view
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with compliant device, low risk score, matching department, on an Active document MUST be able to View (even if embargoed, since PI is exempt)

checks.name: floor_pi_edit
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with compliant device, low risk score, matching department, on an Active document MUST be able to Edit (even if embargoed, since PI is exempt)

checks.name: floor_auditor_cross_dept_view
checks.description: A GlobalAuditor who is also a ClinicalResearcher with clearanceLevel > 3, on an Active non-HighlyRestricted non-embargoed document in a different department MUST be able to View (auditor exemption from cross-dept block)

checks.name: liveness_view
checks.description: View policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_edit
checks.description: Edit policy is not trivially deny-all
